propositions: Add a provider-generic JWKS-backed JWT verifier selected by the `jwt` auth strategy that validates signature, iss, aud (==auth_resource_server_url), and exp/iat/nbf with bounded leeway.

Pin algorithms to an asymmetric allowlist, reject alg:none, and refuse to start when a symmetric algorithm (HS256/HS384/HS512) is configured alongside a JWKS source to block RS256/HS256 key-confusion attacks.
Enforce an SSRF-safe JWKS fetch: HTTPS-only URI fixed from trusted config, bounded timeout, and rejection of private/link-local hosts unless auth_jwt_allow_private_jwks_host is set.

Cap unknown-kid JWKS refetch to at most one per cooldown window using an asyncio.Lock to make the check-and-update atomic and prevent TOCTOU double-fetch, updating the timestamp on every fetch attempt including failures.
Support an optional configurable header `typ` check (auth_jwt_expected_typ, e.g. at+JWT) to prevent cross-JWT confusion, defaulting unset.
Treat JWKS-fetch failure as non-acceptance (deny) while a definitively invalid token returns None, routing all verify-path errors through the S2 redaction helper.
